Petition To Reduce Bond And Supporting Declaration Of Administrator.
Off Calendar Jul-08-2011 Advanced From Aug-02-11 To Jul-18-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Reduce Bond And Supporting Declaration Of Administrator.
Off Calendar Jul-18-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Ex Parte Petition For An Order Shortening Time To Hear A Petition To Reduce Bond (Prob Code Sec 1203)
Off Calendar Jul-08-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Court Authorization And Approval Of Purchase Of Personal Estate Property By Administrator, David Powell
Off Calendar Jul-05-2011 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nerisha Soodeehul for David Powell. Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon stated that Counsel informed him that there is some possibility of legal action against financial institutions holding assets. In addition, Mr. Ferdon stated that there was a dissolution 1996, that the Decedent did not transfer title of the accounts, that the Ex-Husband's name was still on the property and that the Public Administrator may relinquish priority. Ms. Soodeehul stated that she communicated with CalPers, Bank of America, and the Dept. of Motor Vehicles, that they were requesting a Court order, and that there was a strong possibility of litigation in this matter. Mr. Ferdon on behalf of the Public Adminisrtator relinquished priority. The Court granted the petition appointing David Powell as the Administrator (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $304,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-11-2010 Continued To Sep-01-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
